entry.title: New: CR 25-43 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending ADOPTION of Resolution 23-163, CD1, to refer to the Lāna‘i, Maui, and Molokai planning commissions a proposed bill to support the expansion of dedicated parking spaces for electric vehicles under certain conditions.

Disaster Recovery, International Affairs, and Planning Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
